workstreams.title: Make the repo self-verifying off this machine
non_blocking_follow_ups: Create and rehearse a physical off-site copy when external media arrives; the verified interim Google Drive restore already closes WS1.
evidence: Fable 5 independently verified WS1 hermetic clean clone: 535/535 on 2026-07-10.

The 2024-06-13 exit-check escalation is resolved as content_verified_envelope_variance: current and fresh copies match at DBN record-body and canonical record-export levels; historical container hashes remain immutable.
Canonical DBN record-body hashes were backfilled for all 6,626 local raw Databento artifacts. The full integrity run has zero canonical mismatches and zero missing supplemental artifacts.

interim_rehearsal_completed: Google Drive restored 6,785 files / 31,794,213,413 bytes into an isolated temporary directory with zero path/size differences; restored-copy integrity passed 6,626 supplemental checks with zero blockers.

The historical aggregate snapshot databento-one-month-pilot-ef3f49c75c55 is retained and marked superseded by the later same-day snapshot databento-one-month-pilot-bc0f2b1dac6a, whose aggregate hash matches the restored directory.

workstreams.title: Golden-number statistics anchors
evidence: tests/test_statistics_golden.py loads committed tests/fixtures/statistics_golden.json and passes in the hermetic tier.
Fixture documents population skewness, raw Pearson population kurtosis, expected-shortfall tail convention, and local wiki methodology sources.

workstreams.title: Two-zone code rule for all new code
evidence: lib/ now contains IO, Eastern-time timestamp discipline, guardrail validation, search-log writing, report rendering, regime-input loading, and the existing statistics kernel; dedicated hermetic unit tests cover the new modules.
scripts/audit_helper_drift.py runs in the state-audit tier and fixture pipeline, reports drift without auto-fixing frozen scripts, and currently records pass_with_findings.
scripts/audit_new_script_lib_usage.py runs before readiness in the fixture pipeline; the readiness report exposes new_script_lib_usage.bypassing_lib_count, currently 0.

Existing H-A2 callers remain frozen with their run_m5_regime_filter_sensitivity.py dependency. lib/regime_inputs.py is the required replacement for new callers; reproduction of frozen reports remains git checkout of the recorded commit.

workstreams.title: Gate integrity
evidence: The append-only manifest retains three seed gate records and validates active decision/validator SHA-256 pairs.
A new gate revision must append a distinct gate_id with supersedes_gate_id, human_approval, reviewed_by, unchanged paths, and replacement hashes; tests reject an unapproved revision.
scripts/evaluate_research_acceptance.py requires adversarial_review_completed for E2 candidates, and docs/EVIDENCE_TIER_POLICY.md specifies the independent refutation review.

workstreams.title: Evolution hygiene
user_actions_pending: Review docs/REPORT_RETENTION_POLICY_PROPOSAL.md and explicitly approve or revise the destination, first archive scope, and restore-test rule. No archival action is allowed while User-approved remains false.
evidence: The retention proposal now has a machine-checkable User-approved=false gate and explicitly forbids moves, deletion, archival branches, and history rewriting before approval.

experiments/active_wiki_citation_hashes.json binds the two controlling H-A2/H-G1 preregistrations and nine local wiki citations by SHA-256 without mutating the locked/frozen artifacts; the state-audit validator fails on artifact or wiki drift.
The OPRA statistics boundary schema pins dataset/schema, required record columns, OPEN_INTEREST presence, and the vendored stat-type mapping; the Databento probe applies it before research use.
config/governance_epochs.json records the first immutable tag technical-dd-remediation-ws5-2026-07-11; tag creation and push are session-exit evidence.
